---
title: "data import"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-08"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================================
# build_master_dataset.r
# ============================================================================

project_dir <- "C:/Users/Gaming PC/OneDrive - University of Aberdeen/honours project"
setwd(project_dir)

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(terra)
library(sf)
library(rotl)
library(ape)

options(stringsAsFactors = FALSE)›
if (!dir.exists("outputs")) dir.create("outputs")

# ============================================================================
# load data
# ============================================================================

gbif_raw <- read_delim("raw data/occurence_data.csv", 
                       delim = "\t", 
                       show_col_types = FALSE)

bioclim_rast <- rast("raw data/bioclimatic_data.tif")
elev_files <- list.files("raw data/elevation_data", pattern = "\\.tif$", full.names = TRUE)
elev_rast <- rast(elev_files[1])

# globtherm
gt_files <- list.files("raw data/globtherm_thermal_data", 
                       pattern = "\\.(csv|txt|tsv)$", full.names = TRUE)
if (length(gt_files) > 0) {
  globtherm_raw <- read_delim(gt_files[1], show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  globtherm_raw <- NULL
}

# dryad - try all csv files if subterranean pattern fails
dryad_files <- list.files("raw data/dryad_thermal_data_evolution", 
                          pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
if (length(dryad_files) > 0) {
  cat("\navailable dryad files:\n")
  print(basename(dryad_files))
  dryad_raw <- read_csv(dryad_files[1], show_col_types = FALSE)
  cat("loaded:", basename(dryad_files[1]), "\n")
} else {
  dryad_raw <- NULL
}

# anage
anage_files <- list.files("raw data/anage_metabolic_data", 
                          pattern = "\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)
if (length(anage_files) > 0) {
  anage_raw <- read_delim(anage_files[1], delim = "\t", show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  anage_raw <- NULL
}

# ============================================================================
# detailed column inspection for genus + species
# ============================================================================

cat("\n=== COLUMN STRUCTURE ===\n")

# globtherm columns
if (!is.null(globtherm_raw)) {
  cat("\n--- GLOBTHERM ALL COLUMNS ---\n")
  print(names(globtherm_raw))
  
  cat("\ncolumns containing 'genus':\n")
  print(grep("genus", names(globtherm_raw), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE))
  
  cat("\nsample rows:\n")
  globtherm_raw %>% 
    select(matches("genus|species", ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
    head(5) %>%
    print()
}

# anage columns
if (!is.null(anage_raw)) {
  cat("\n--- ANAGE ALL COLUMNS ---\n")
  print(names(anage_raw))
  
  cat("\ncolumns containing 'genus':\n")
  print(grep("genus", names(anage_raw), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE))
  
  cat("\nsample rows:\n")
  anage_raw %>% 
    select(matches("genus|species", ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
    head(5) %>%
    print()
}

# dryad columns
if (!is.null(dryad_raw)) {
  cat("\n--- DRYAD ALL COLUMNS ---\n")
  print(names(dryad_raw))
  
  cat("\ncolumns containing 'genus' or 'species':\n")
  print(grep("genus|species", names(dryad_raw), value = TRUE, ignore.case = TRUE))
  
  cat("\nsample rows:\n")
  dryad_raw %>% 
    select(matches("genus|species|name", ignore.case = TRUE)) %>%
    head(5) %>%
    print()
}

# gbif - check what's in scientificName
cat("\n--- GBIF scientificName FORMAT ---\n")
cat("sample names:\n")
print(head(gbif_raw$scientificName, 10))

cat("\n=== INSPECTION COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("\nNext step: identify genus columns and standardize names\n")
```
